headline: Did FDA’s High‑Dose SPINRAZA Approval Just Shift Biogen’s (BIIB) Rare Disease Investment Narrative?
summary: In late March 2026, Biogen announced that the U.S. FDA approved a new High Dose Regimen of SPINRAZA (nusinersen) for spinal muscular atrophy, allowing faster loading with two 50 mg doses and 28 mg maintenance injections every four months based on positive Phase 2/3 DEVOTE data. This regimen, already cleared in the U.S., European Union, Switzerland, and Japan, may strengthen SPINRAZA’s role across a broad SMA population by offering a higher-dose option with an accelerated initiation...

content.title: Did FDA’s High‑Dose SPINRAZA Approval Just Shift Biogen’s (BIIB) Rare Disease Investment Narrative?

This regimen, already cleared in the U.S., European Union, Switzerland, and Japan, may strengthen SPINRAZA’s role across a broad SMA population by offering a higher-dose option with an accelerated initiation...

headline: Biogen to Acquire Apellis, Enhancing the Company’s Growth Portfolio in Immunology and Rare Disease, Bolstering Growth Outlook and Accelerating Expansion into Nephrology
summary: Acquisition will bring two differentiated commercialized immunology medicines to Biogen with EMPAVELI® FDA-approved in three indications, including two rare kidney diseases, and SYFOVRE® FDA-approved in geographic atrophy, an immune-mediated retinal diseaseBringing together Biogen and Apellis’ commercialization capabilities will maximize the potential of both EMPAVELI® and SYFOVRE®, while Apellis’ talent and expertise will accelerate Biogen’s entry into nephrology and augment launch readiness fo

headline: Nvidia invests $2B in Marvell, Eli Lilly to buy drugmaker Centessa
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma takes a closer look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories, including some of the latest deals and investments.Nvidia (NVDA) is investing $2 billion in Marvell (MRVL).Biogen (BIIB) is buying Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) for $5.6 billion.Eli Lilly (LLY) is set to buy sleep-drug maker Centessa (CNTA) for up to $7.8 billion.

content.title: Nvidia invests $2B in Marvell, Eli Lilly to buy drugmaker Centessa
content.description:
Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma takes a closer look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories, including some of the latest deals and investments.

Nvidia (NVDA) is investing $2 billion in Marvell (MRVL).

Biogen (BIIB) is buying Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) for $5.6 billion.

Eli Lilly (LLY) is set to buy sleep-drug maker Centessa (CNTA) for up to $7.8 billion.
content.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma takes a closer look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories, including some of the latest deals and investments.Nvidia (NVDA) is investing $2 billion in Marvell (MRVL).Biogen (BIIB) is buying Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) for $5.6 billion.Eli Lilly (LLY) is set to buy sleep-drug maker Centessa (CNTA) for up to $7.8 billion.

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: CoreWeave, Microsoft, McCormick, Constellation, Biogen, Marvell, and More
summary: Stocks were rising Tuesday following a report that said President Donald Trump told aides he was willing to end the war in Iran even if the U.S. and its allies fail to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  The facility received an A3 rating from  Moody’s  marking the first time a loan backed by high-performance computing infrastructure has achieved investment-grade status.  Microsoft  advanced 1.6% after the tech giant said it would invest more than $1 billion in cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure in Thailand between 2026 and 2028.

The facility received an A3 rating from  Moody’s  marking the first time a loan backed by high-performance computing infrastructure has achieved investment-grade status.  Microsoft  advanced 1.6% after the tech giant said it would invest more than $1 billion in cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure in Thailand between 2026 and 2028.
